VAL-AUTO-006.evidence: GET /tokenlist returned HTTP 200. Has tokens array: True. Token count: 1367. First token sample verified with chainId, address, name, symbol, decimals fields present.

VAL-AUTO-001.evidence: Typed USDC in #from input. Dropdown appeared with 1 item showing USDC token with full address (Base chain). Screenshot: val-auto-001-from-autocomplete.png

VAL-AUTO-002.evidence: Typed WETH in #to input. Dropdown appeared with 1 item showing WETH token with full address (Base chain). Screenshot: val-auto-002-to-autocomplete.png

VAL-AUTO-003.evidence: Mock wallet injected and connected. Wallet visible: {"hasAddress": true, "hasDisconnect": true}. Typed USDC in From field. Dropdown appeared with 1 item. Screenshot: val-auto-003-autocomplete-with-wallet.png

VAL-AUTO-004.evidence: Typed USDC, clicked first autocomplete item. Item shows USDC symbol with full 42-char address. Input value populated with token symbol and full address in parentheses. data-address attribute set to full contract address. Dropdown hidden after selection. Screenshots: val-auto-004-before-select.png, val-auto-004-after-select.png

VAL-AUTO-005.evidence: Base USDC: shows USDC token with Base chain contract address. Ethereum USDC: shows USDC token with different Ethereum chain contract address. Addresses differ between chains: True. Screenshots: val-auto-005-base-usdc.png, val-auto-005-ethereum-usdc.png
